nasb.text: Shimei the Ramathite had charge of the vineyards; and Zabdi the Shiphmite had charge of the produce of the vineyards stored in the wine cellars.

esv.text: and over the vineyards was Shimei the Ramathite; and over the produce of the vineyards for the wine cellars was Zabdi the Shiphmite.

cnv.text: 管理葡萄園的，是拉瑪人示每；管理園裡酒庫的，是實弗米人撒巴底；

ccb.text: 拉玛人示每管理葡萄园。实弗米人撒巴底管理葡萄园的酒窖。
